title: CobbleRods
description: An Addon for Cobblemon that adds different Bonuses to your Poké Rod depending on it's Bobber, making different Bobber's no longer just cosmetic!
body:
# CobbleRods

CobbleRods is a small Cobblemon addon mod that adds certain bonuses to your Poké Rod depending on their bobber (What Ball you used to smith them), so the different Poké Rod bobbers are no longer purely cosmetic.

## Bonuses
### Premier Ball:
- +2% Pokémon Chance
### Great Ball:
- +1 Rarity Tier
### Ultra Ball:
- +2 Rarity Tier
- 10% Bait Save Chance
### Safar Ball:
- +1 Item Loot Rolls
### Fast Ball:
- 0.85x Bite Time
### Level Ball:
- +1 Rarity Tier
### Lure Ball:
- +10% Pokémon Chance
- 0.80x Bite Time
### Heavy Ball:
- +1 Rarity Tier
- 5% Bait Save Chance
### Love Ball:
- +5% Pokémon Chance
### Friend Ball:
- +5% Pokémon Chance
### Moon Ball:
- +5% Pokémon Chance
- +1 Rarity Tier
### Sport Ball:
- +1 Item Loot Rolls
### Park Ball:
- +3% Pokémon Chance
- +1 Rarity Tier
### Net Ball:
- +5% Pokémon Chance
### Dive Ball:
- +5% Pokémon Chance
### Nest Ball:
- +3% Pokémon Chance
### Repeat Ball:
- 10% Bait Save Chance
### Timer Ball:
- +1 Rarity Tier
- 5% Bait Save Chance
- +15% Item Loot Luck
### Luxury Ball:
- +1 Rarity Tier
- 15% Bait Save Chance
### Dusk Ball:
- +5% Pokémon Chance
- +1 Rarity Tier
### Heal Ball:
- 20% Bait Save Chance
### Quick Ball:
- 0.75x Bite Time
### Dream Ball:
- +2 Rarity Tier
### Beast Ball:
- +2 Rarity Tier
- +25% Item Loot Luck
### Master Ball:
- +10% Pokémon Chance
- +4 Rarity Tier
- 25% Bait Save Chance
### Cherish Ball:
- +2 Rarity Tier
- 10% Bait Save Chance
- +15% Item Loot Luck
### Ancient Great Ball:
- +1 Rarity Tier
### Ancient Ultra Ball:
- +2 Rarity Tier
- 10% Bait Save Chance
### Ancient Feather Ball:
- 0.90x Bite Time
### Ancient Wing Ball:
- 0.85x Bite Time
### Ancient Jet Ball:
- 0.80x Bite Time
### Ancient Heavy Ball:
- +1 Rarity Tier
- 3% Bait Save Chance
### Ancient Leaden Ball:
- +2 Rarity Tier
- 5% Bait Save Chance
### Ancient Gigaton Ball:
- +3 Rarity Tier
- 7% Bait Save Chance
### Ancient Origin Ball:
- +5% Pokémon Chance
- +3 Rarity Tier
- 10% Bait Save Chance

All bonuses can be changed in the cobblerods.json config
